feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Cloud
feed.subtitle: ABAP Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: File Download in ABAP Cloud on BTP with eclipse ADT
entry.content:
I am using ABAP Environment  in BTP trial version and need to download a csv fille to local pc.

However I cant use the usual ways  due to restrictions on ABAP on Cloud. For example use of CL_GUI_FRONTEND_SERVICES  is not allowed.

Is there any other way to do it ?

I have some idea to achieve with using a custom RAP application which can be made reusable.  But before I start implementing this just need to confirm if something like this already exist.

entry.title: Enable Joule for on-prem ABAP Development
entry.content:
Can Joule be enabled for on-prem ADT ABAP project development for AI Coding Assistance? We are running the newest available version of on-premise S/4 HANA (2023 FSP02 instance). The AI Core set-up guide & Launchpad provisioning guide are a great start but I am missing how the on-premise system enables Joule after the cloud connector is established. 

SAP Note 3513374 mentions the possibility to integrate with SAP_BASIS 756 and up. However, after setting up AI Core and Launchpad - I cannot locate any documentation on how to complete the integration for on-prem systems. 

Our objective is to have Joule enabled from our ADT development environment. Joule is currently not recognized as enabled.

 

The Generative AI in ABAP Cloud Docs only mention validity for Public Cloud & BTP ABAP. Subsequent guides require establishing communication system and communication arrangement configuration, which I do not think that our on-prem system has the ability to configure.

What are the final steps to enable the Joule code assistant in an on-premise S/4 HANA system?

__PRESENT__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

entry.title: Attachments service on S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am using the GET API from the attachment service API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV to retrieve attachments from a work order in the S4 public cloud environment. I provide the parameters DocumentInfoRecordDocType, DocumentInfoRecordDocVersion, DocumentInfoRecordDocNumber, and DocumentInfoRecordDocPart. Although I get a response but it only includes the attachmentcontenthash, the Content field in the response is not being populated. Anyone has an idea how to convert this SHA256 value to Base64 or XSTRING?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: SAP Identity Directory API not working from RAP & CAP
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a requirement to create Users in SAP BTP whenever the supplier registers with email id. For this SAP has provided Identity Directory API Overview | Identity Directory API | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

In above link I want to use Users.

Below is the destination set up

We are trying to call API from ABAP on Cloud and CAPM but it is failing in both cases below are the details.

From ABAP on Cloud:

 

When trying option 1 and 2 we are getting below error.

"401","detail":"Authentication credentials are invalid or not allowed for this endpoint."

CAPM:

After deploying to cloud foundry we get below error.

 

We get below error.

 

Surprisingly when we try from Postman hub it is working fine.

 Can anyone help?

entry.title: What is the quickest way to transfer data from an on-premise SAP ECC system to SAP BTP?
entry.content: we have a few applications built in ABAP RAP running on SAP BTP environment. These apps need to access some real time data on our SAP ECC on-premise system. I want to understand what is the best and the fastest way which brings good performance. Should we use OData to fetch the data or should we use RFC to fetch the data. Based on my search on the internet it seems that RFC is much faster than OData. Has anyone tried both of them and has found one better over the other?

entry.title: help for to change equipment bom for ib02 t-code
entry.content:
hello experts.

CSAI_BOM_MAINTAIN this function module  is to add the new materials for equipment .

then What about modifying one component that it was created before?

please let me know if any one have worked on this.

thanks&regards.

vikas.t

entry.title: Create and update action in custom table while implementing cloud BADI in S4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts, I have implementing a cloud BADI badi_mmim_check_matdocitem in S4 Hana public cloud system using developer extensibility. Since this BADI do not have yeild quantity I have entered while cobnfirming the production order. I want to SAVE the data into custom table and fetch the data again to validate against the quantity.

My question is how should be update a custom table in cloud BADI. I am getting error as Executing "MODIFY <dbtab>" from "CHECK_ITEM" violates transactional contract "FUNCTIONAL".

entry.title: Unable to Retrieve Business Data in Custom Inbound API on BO – S/4HANA Cloud 2502 (RAP)
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am trying to create custom inbound API based on TUTORIAL from developers.sap.com. The problem is that i can't get data from my system on Partner Demo Customizing tenant (100) for S4H Cloud Public Edition 2502 to test it. When i try use option Data Preview i got below message. 

Additionally, when i released service binding based on CDS Projection View for I_SupplierInvoiceTP to validate it, the symptoms were the same - table was empty. ...

My activities: 

  • In my opinion i have enough business roles assigned because i have an access to Manage Sales Order application where i can search for created documents. Maybe not enough? - if so, where i can find information about necessary business roles that i need to assign to my account on S4Hana system ?

  • CDS has released contracts C1 and C0.  

  • What's more, in my Partner Demo Development tenant (080) i have an access to preview data. But it's a development system without business data so i can't test my Business Object.

Does anyone know solution that will help me to get an access to business data to test my custom inbound API based on BO ? Frankly, i am run out of concepts what i can do more... 

Best regards, AN

entry.title: SAP RAP - ABAP Runtime Error 'BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working on an SAP RAP-based development and encountering an ABAP Runtime Error 'BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT' when executing a button action.

The button requires a parameter input, and when I enter a value and click the button, the error occurs.

Inside my class, I am calling another class where I use BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT and BAPI_TRANSACTION_ROLLBACK. However, I receive the following error message:

Error Message:

Statement "ROLLBACK WORK" is not allowed with this status.

It seems that calling COMMIT WORK or ROLLBACK WORK directly is restricted within the transactional context of RAP.

How can I handle transactional BAPI calls properly within RAP without triggering this error?

Thanks in advance!


errorInformation code line:

entry.title: USE OF AI IN ECLIPSE
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to use AI in eclipse. My requirement is like this,

I want to auto generate CDS, Database tables , domain , data elements, directly in my package using the Prompt, now we have AI options like 

1)  Joule 

But Joule serves primarily as an assistant to enhance productivity. It offers AI-based capabilities that help in understanding complex development objects, generating code snippets, and providing interactive support through a chat interface.

for joule i have used this blog.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/joule-speaks-abap/ba-p/14018226

2) i have read this post also, which may be the possible way to achieve this functionality

I have gone through this post but its in beta and beta features are enabled in my cockpit, and still i am not able to see that option in my eclipse.  

teched2024-AD180/exercises/ex01/README.md at main · SAP-samples/teched2024-AD180 · GitHub

Can any one suggest me a solution, it will be helpful 

Thanks,

Basant

entry.title: Is it advisable to create all classic APIs for Tier 2 ABAP Cloud Development in single class?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a requirement to create multiple APIs for tier2 to consume the same in Tier1. Is it advisable to create all the wrapper objects in a single class as a separate method or should we go with individual wrapper class for each classic API?

Regards,

Ram Peddireddi

entry.title: Graduate Student Programs for SAP Certification - Seeking Advice
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm currently pursuing my Master's in Information Systems and have about 5 years of experience as an ABAP Developer.

As I continue my academic journey, I'm looking to enhance my credentials with the SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer - ABAP Cloud  and SAP Fiori Application Developer certification. I'm specifically interested in:

  • Are there any special programs or discounts available for graduate students pursuing SAP certifications
  • Does SAP offer any university alliance programs that provide certification opportunities?
  • Has anyone here completed this certification while being a student? If so, what was your experience like?
  • Any recommendations on the best preparation resources for this certification that are budget-friendly for students?
  • Are there any mentorship programs available for students aiming to specialize in SAP development?

Additionally, if there are any specific grants, scholarships, or corporate sponsorship programs that support SAP certification for graduate students, I'd appreciate that information as well.

I believe this certification would strengthen my professional credentials and prior industry experience, making me more competitive in the job market as I advance my career in SAP development.

Thank you in advance for your insights and advice!

Best regards,
Kavyasri

entry.title: Public cloud CDS views (maintenance order & operation)
entry.content:
Dear team, for public cloud I need maintenance order and operation CDS view. please suggest some CDS view.

Thanks.

@aoyang

entry.title: Custom Entity Action: How to insert a new record?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’ve created a custom entity in ABAP Cloud and used a query implementation, which works fine for reading data.

Now, I’m trying to define an action on this entity that should insert a new record — basically, I want the action to increase the number of entries.

However, after running the action, no new record is added, even though there are no errors.

Is it possible to insert data inside an action for a custom entity? Or is there a better approach for this kind of logic?

If yes, could you please share an example? I’ve been struggling with this and would really appreciate some help.

Thanks a lot!

 

MODIFY ENTITY ZBTCTR_CE_INCOMING

CREATE FROM lt_ins

FAILED DATA(lt_failed) REPORTED DATA(lt_reported) MAPPED DATA(lt_mapped).

entry.title: Hide UI.Facet dynamically w/ ABAP CDS annotcation
entry.content:
I am attempting to show/hide UI facets using only ABAP CDS annotations with Fiori Element App Preview from eclipse (ADT). Our S/4 HANA on-premise 2023 system components. 

In the CDS projection view, I create a virtual element. Any boolean type other than 'abap_boolean' gives a deprecrated warning: 'Data Element xfeld is deprecated. Use Data Element ABAP_BOOLEAN instead', so we use abap_boolean. 

@EndUserText.label: 'Hide Section 1'
@UI.hidden: true
virtual hideSection1IsEnabled: abap_boolean,

 

In the metadata extension, we attempt to reference the virtual element but are given error 'Annotation value "hideSection1IsEnabled" must be of type 'Boolean'.@EndUserText.label: 'Hide Section 1' @ui.hidden: true virtual hideSection1IsEnabled: abap_boolean,  

  @UI.facet: [
  {
    parentId: 'Section1',
    id: 'SubSection1',
    type: #FIELDGROUP_REFERENCE,
    label: 'Sub Section 1',
    targetQualifier: 'DetailsGroup',
    hidden: 'hideSection1IsEnabled'
  },

__PRESENT

entry.title: Processing exception during a "Render" operation. .ProcessingException: IO error detected while open
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

 I am working on adobe form and I am facing system error  as show below.

 


 I have done all the three tests of ADS
FP_TEST_00
FP_CHECK_DESTINATION_SERVICE
FP_PDF_TEST_00

All the three reports are giving the results as expected .

Earlier I did not understand what the system error is about. After going through few threads I could able to trace from where the error is coming and what the error is about.

CREATE_OUTPUT_CURRENT_FORM is the subroutine where I could able to capture the error.

The following is the error :

Processing exception during a "Render" operation. Request start time: Tue Apr 08 14:40:29 IST 2025 com.adobe.ProcessingException: com.adobe.ProcessingException: IO error detected while opening DEST connection: http://100.64.109.143:8080/sap/bc/fp/form/layout/ZMATERIAL_EXP_QA_CHECK2.XDP?fp-language=EN&fp-mlayout-sup=X&fp-cacheinfo=2025-04-07T05:34:18Z$5ef403a9-256d-4ee3-aaef-7f7832056b50$0$en$v1.0$ Exception Stack Trace: com.adobe.

NOTE : I am getting this error only in quality system . It is working fine in Development system.
Can you please let me know what is the cause of this system error and how to fix it. ?


I could able to find one post where the issue is the same as above and solution was offered to open backend system port connection from portal side. The thread is the below one. It is not clear to how to do it.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/problem-trying-read-data-from-destination/qaq-p/4290340

entry.title: CORS and Access-Control-Allow-Origin in SAP Build APPS when I try to call SAP ABAP cloud odata
entry.content:
Dear Community 

I'm working on implementation of SAP Build Apps application low code based on ABAP on cloud odata service . 

I have created the destination in SAP BTP destination as follows : 

And I have tried to make a get call over this destination as follows : 

Unfortunatly I'm blocked and it does not work : 

I tried many workaround and it does not work . 

 

And samething when I used basic authentification it does not work . 

 

your urgent help is highly appreciated

entry.title: SAP ABAP RAP Query String parameters not available to access
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I created service using Unmanaged scenario using ABAP RAP... Below are the details for reference. 

Issue : I am not able access Query String parameter in code: I need param1, param2, param3 values in code 

www.abc.com/GetData?param1=10&param2=20&param3=30

Created Custom Root entity with few fields and Implemented Interface if_rap_query_provider and added below code in Custom Root entity

@EndUserText.label: 'Shimano API-WOrder/WTask'
@ObjectModel: {
    query: {
        implementedBy: 'ABAP:ZCL_EWM_WAREHOUSE_TASK'
    }
}
define root custom entity ZCE_WAREHOUSEORDERTASK
  with parameters 
  @Consumption.hidden: true
        WHO1 : num10
{
  key WHO     : num10;
  key LGNUM   : /scwm/lgnum;
      TANUM   : numc12;
      HUIDENT : char20;
}

Below is my Query Provide Select Method code for reference :

DATA:ls_data TYPE /scwm/who,
         lt_data TYPE /scwm/tt_who.
    IF io_request->is_data_requested( ).
      DATA(lv_top)     = io_request->get_paging( )->get_page_size( ).
      IF lv_top < 0.
        lv_top = 1.
      ENDIF.
      DATA(lt_parameters) = io_request->get_parameters(  ).
      DATA(lv_search_string) = io_request->get_search_expression( ).
      DATA(lv_skip)    = io_request->get_paging( )->get_offset( ).
      DATA(lt_sort)    = io_request->get_sort_elements( ).
      DATA : lv_orderby TYPE string.
      LOOP AT lt_sort INTO DATA(ls_sort).
        IF ls_sort-descending = abap_true.
          lv_orderby = |'{ lv_orderby } { ls_sort-element_name } DESCENDING '|.
        ELSE.
          lv_orderby = |'{ lv_orderby } { ls_sort-element_name } ASCENDING '|.
        ENDIF.
      ENDLOOP.
      DATA(lv_conditions) =  io_request->get_filter( )->get_as_sql_string( ).
      SELECT * FROM /scwm/who INTO TABLE lt_data
              WHERE (lv_conditions).
      "IF io_request->is_total_numb_of_rec_requested(  ).
      io_response->set_total_number_of_records( lines( lt_data ) ).
      io_response->set_data( lt_data ).
      "ENDIF.
    ENDIF.
  ENDMETHOD.

WHO1 is Parameter name which I am trying to access value of. My expectation was to get value of WH01 at line number 8 in above code, which is not happening. I am getting blank internal table.

Need is to access parameter from Query String Only using GET method.

I am already able to access these parameters when Passed in Header, Body and by using POST method which is triggered using an Action.

Please help how can I access these parameters from Query String using GET method.

Thanks-

entry.title: RAP100 - There are no sections. The page is empty.
entry.content:
Hi.
I have an error at the end of the mission RAP100 ( Get Started with SAP BTP, ABAP environment ).
"There are no sections. The page is empty."
I followed the steps but it didn't work.
I didn't use the trial.

Any tips?

entry.title: I want to use HTML5 Vocabulary RowSpanForDuplicateValues ​​feature. Please tell me how.
entry.content:
I want to use HTML5 Vocabulary RowSpanForDuplicateValues ​​feature. Please tell me how.

 
<Annotation Term="UI.LineItem" >
                <Collection>                    
                    <Record Type="UI.DataField">                                      
                        <PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="CategoryID"/>
                        <PropertyValue Property="Label" String="{@i18n>category}"/>                    
                        <Annotation Term="HTML5.RowSpanForDuplicateValues" Bool="true"/>
 .............................................
 
I configured it as above, but there is no change on the screen.

 

===============================

HTML5 Vocabulary

Namespace: com.sap.vocabularies.HTML5.v1

Terms for HTML5

The HTML5 vocabulary provides rendering hints for HTML5 clients

Terms

Term Type Description

CssDefaultsCssDefaultsTypeCSS definitions that may be used as defaults
This term can applied to e.g. UI.DataFieldAbstract records
LinkTargetLinkTargetTypeWhere to open a link for the annotated URL
When the UI contains a link to the URL, it shall open as specified by this annotation. This can be achieved, for example, by giving the UI5 sap.m.Link element a corresponding target property. Applicability of this term is governed by Validation.ApplicableTerms annotations.
RowSpanForDuplicateValues (Experimental)TagThe annotated data field might use a rowSpan for adjacent duplicate values if used in a table.
In order to achieve a good user experience the respective columns should be sorted. Applicability of this term is governed by Validation.ApplicableTerms annotations.
